summary: Complete testing of profile photo upload feature. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Profile picture and cover photo upload functionality working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: media_upload_routes.py: POST /profile-upload endpoint correctly handles avatar and cover uploads with Cloudinary transformations (avatar: 400x400 face crop, cover: 1500x500 fill)
media_upload_routes.py: Non-image files correctly rejected with 400 status and descriptive error message
Profile.js: Edit Profile modal correctly shows Cover Photo and Profile Picture upload sections at top of modal
Profile.js: Inline click-to-upload on cover photo and avatar areas works correctly (own profile only)
Profile.js: isOwnProfile check correctly prevents upload UI from appearing on other users' profiles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile photo upload feature fully tested and working. Key features: 1) POST /api/media/profile-upload?upload_type=avatar uploads to Cloudinary avatars folder with 400x400 face crop. 2) POST /api/media/profile-upload?upload_type=cover uploads to Cloudinary covers folder with 1500x500 fill. 3) PUT /api/profile/update accepts profile_picture and cover_photo fields. 4) Edit Profile modal has Cover Photo and Profile Picture upload sections. 5) Inline click-to-upload on profile page works for own profile only.

backend_api_tests.test_avatar_upload_returns_cloudinary_ur: PASS - Returns URL starting with https://res.cloudinary.com/ in /avatars/ folder
backend_api_tests.test_cover_upload_returns_cloudinary_url: PASS - Returns URL starting with https://res.cloudinary.com/ in /covers/ folder
backend_api_tests.test_upload_rejects_non_image_files: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Only images allowed' message
backend_api_tests.test_upload_rejects_pdf_files: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Only images allowed' message
backend_api_tests.test_update_both_photos_at_once: PASS - Both fields can be updated in one request
backend_api_tests.test_upload_requires_file: PASS - Returns 422 when file is missing
backend_api_tests.test_upload_type_defaults_to_avatar: PASS - Defaults to avatars folder when upload_type not specified

frontend_ui_tests.edit_profile_button_visible: PASS - data-testid='edit-profile-btn' found on own profile
frontend_ui_tests.cover_photo_upload_section: PASS - 'Cover Photo' label and data-testid='cover-upload-input' found in modal
frontend_ui_tests.profile_picture_upload_section: PASS - 'Profile Picture' label and data-testid='avatar-upload-input' found in modal
frontend_ui_tests.modal_form_fields: PASS - Name, Bio, Location, Website inputs and Save button found
frontend_ui_tests.inline_cover_upload: PASS - id='inline-cover-upload' input found on own profile
frontend_ui_tests.inline_avatar_upload: PASS - id='inline-avatar-upload' input found on own profile
frontend_ui_tests.cover_area_clickable: PASS - Cover photo area has cursor-pointer class on own profile
frontend_ui_tests.avatar_area_clickable: PASS - Avatar area has cursor-pointer class on own profile
frontend_ui_tests.hover_shows_camera_icon: PASS - Camera icon appears on hover over cover photo
frontend_ui_tests.other_profile_no_upload: PASS - Upload inputs NOT present on other user's profile
frontend_ui_tests.other_profile_no_edit_btn: PASS - Edit Profile button NOT present on other user's profile
frontend_ui_tests.other_profile_not_clickable: PASS - Cover/avatar areas NOT clickable on other user's profile

feature_verification.avatar_upload_to_cloudinary: VERIFIED - POST /api/media/profile-upload?upload_type=avatar uploads to Cloudinary avatars folder
feature_verification.cover_upload_to_cloudinary: VERIFIED - POST /api/media/profile-upload?upload_type=cover uploads to Cloudinary covers folder
feature_verification.profile_update_with_photos: VERIFIED - PUT /api/profile/update accepts profile_picture and cover_photo fields
feature_verification.edit_modal_photo_sections: VERIFIED - Edit Profile modal shows Cover Photo and Profile Picture upload sections
feature_verification.inline_click_to_upload: VERIFIED - Click on cover/avatar areas on profile page triggers file upload (own profile only)
feature_verification.non_image_rejection: VERIFIED - Non-image files rejected with 400 status
feature_verification.cloudinary_transformations: VERIFIED - Avatar uses 400x400 face crop, cover uses 1500x500 fill
